Job Title: Data Analyst

Company: Tata Consultancy Services
Location: Hyderabad, India
Salary: ₹4–8 LPA

📄 Job Description:

Analyze business data, generate insights, and support decision-making using tools like SQL, Excel, and Power BI.

Bachelor’s degree
Strong analytical skills
Knowledge of SQL

full_text:
Job Title: Software Engineer (Backend)

Company: Infosys
Location: Bangalore, India
Salary: ₹6–10 LPA

📄 Job Description:

We are looking for a Backend Developer to design and develop scalable web applications. You will work with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.

🎯 Requirements:
B.Tech / B.E in Computer Science or related field
Experience in Python / Java
Knowledge of REST APIs and databases
💼 Benefits:
Health insurance
Paid leave
Career growth opportunities
📩 Apply:

Apply through official careers page: https://www.infosys.com/careers
label: Fraudulent

Job Title: Amazon Product Reviewer (Part-Time)

Company: Amazon Hiring Team (Fake)

Location: Remote

Salary: ₹10,000/week

Description:
Get paid for reviewing products. We will send you products and you just need to give 5-star ratings.

Requirement:

No experience needed
Age 18+

Important:
Pay ₹999 to activate your account.

Contact: WhatsApp only
label: Fraudulent
